verses.text: Topa phat un. Topa zahtakin a thupiaknate nuam a sa mahmah mi, thupha ngah mi ahi hi
Ama suanlekhakte leitungah vanglian ding a, a lungsim thutang mite' suanlekhakte thupha kipia ding hi
Hauhna leh nopsaknate a innkuan sungah dim ding a, ama thumanna kip tawntung ding hi
Lungsim thutangte-a' dingin khuamial sung panin khuavak hong taangkhia hi. Topa dik a, hehpihna nei-in, amah thuman hi
Cingh gamtatin mite tungah leitawi pia a, thutangin a gamta mite tungah thu a hoih hi
Amah kilinglo taktak ding a, kiphawk tawntung ding hi
Amah in thusia zakding laulo hi. Topa muang a, ama lungsim a kip hi
Amah lauloin, lunghimawh loin om hithiat a, amah a langpangte a guallelh ding a theitel hi
Amah in hawmkhia zuahzuah a, mizawngte tungah a piakhia hi. Ama migitna kip tawntung a, amah vanglianin kipahtawi ding hi
Migilo in hih thu mu-in a heh suak mahmah a, a ha gawigawi-in a tuimang hi. Migilote' lametna a mawkna a suakta hi.
